themes.exampleQuote: A little bit of Paris in Pittsburgh.
The seasonal La Ruche might be the best dessert I have ever had.
It is busy on weekends. You can call ahead if you know what you want.
This place was the find of Pittsburgh. Breakfast and lunch!
Nut and chocolate croissants that were all fantastic. The cream puff was delicious.

notable_quote: The seasonal La Ruche from La Gourmandine might be the best dessert I have ever had.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers keep returning to the specificity of the pastry case, naming individual items like La Ruche, deluxe de pistache, and chocolate croissants, while the only friction in the room is weekend crowding and occasional uncertainty about seasonal availability.
quarter_narrative: Five Pittsburgh creators filed seven TikToks about La Gourmandine this quarter and the bakery posted nothing back. The 17,694 plays those videos collected represent a city actively recommending this place to itself, with @melissasadhdlife's croissant clip alone pulling 7,521 views on a caption that needed no selling. Meanwhile the bakery's own Instagram has sat quiet for more than six weeks, a strange silence for a location that 1,294 Google reviewers have already decided they love. In the Pittsburgh Sweets family, Page's holds the top signal position on social momentum; La Gourmandine leads the narrower bakery category on the depth of its review record but sits eighth in Sweets precisely because that Instagram gap pulls the composite down. Closing that gap, even partially, is the clearest path toward the middle of the Sweets table.
tldr_read: Fourteen hundred reviews and five creators filming it this quarter, but the bakery's own Instagram has been dark for six weeks. Ones to Watch, first in Pittsburgh Bakeries, eighth in Pittsburgh Sweets.
tldr_meaning: The review foundation and creator interest are already doing the work; the rank ceiling in the Sweets family lifts the moment the Instagram signal comes back online.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Eighth In Sweets Despite A Deep Review Record. The Feed Has Gone Quiet.

playbook.headline: Restart the Instagram feed consistently
playbook.action: The account has posted zero times in 42 days; even two posts per week featuring named seasonal items would reactivate the momentum signal.

playbook.headline: Surface the creators already filming here
playbook.action: Five creators have produced seven TikToks this quarter totaling 17,694 plays; resharing that content to Instagram stories costs nothing and keeps the feed active between original posts.

playbook.headline: Name seasonal items in every caption
playbook.action: Reviews call out La Ruche, deluxe de pistache, and chocolate croissants by name; posting availability windows for limited items would drive the reply and save traffic reviewers are already asking about.
